originalAlarm.description: The value written to `&len` is never used.

presenceCondition:
(and (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP true)
     (= ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH false)
     (= BB_MMU true))
model:
(define-fun BB_MMU () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_GZIP () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_HTTPD_BASIC_AUTH () Bool
  false)
reasoning: send_headers(): len accumulates sprintf values (L25, L36 with GZIP=T) but printf at L38 uses iobuf directly — len dead. GZIP=T required (content_gzip declared). BASIC_AUTH=F and BB_MMU=T unnecessary. No '// ERROR' → new bug. Over-constrained. Classification: TRUE_NEW_OVER.
